spec_match.rationale: The demo uses the standardized featureLevel compatibility request and checks core-features-and-limits on the device.

interactive.rationale: Real interactive controls drive the page (1 buttons, 0 inputs, 0 selects, 0 ranges, 1 listeners) — well past the static-card bar.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Concept page lede restates and delivers on the framing used in the feature index card.

edge_cases.rationale: Page surfaces multiple failure / unsupported / edge-case branches in the UI, not just the happy path.

references.rationale: Page cites the required chromestatus.com/feature/6436406437871616 self-heal link.

design_system.rationale: Uses CSS variables throughout, no raw hex of note, and button overrides keep background + color paired (CLAUDE.md rules 5 and 6).

summary: Cross-Platform Renderer now uses the standardized compatibility-mode API and includes the required ChromeStatus link.
